title: Balanced Search Trees and Order Statistics
description: Maintain an ordered index with predictable latency during sorted and mixed updates. Learners cumulatively produce a balanced-tree trace and order-statistic extension through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Trace rotations while preserving binary-search order and reconnecting every affected link.
Maintain AVL heights and select single or double rotations from imbalance shape.
Use red-black color properties to bound height and guide update repair.
